channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Building a Fully Automated Horse Racing AI Prediction Pipeline with Flutter + Supabase
item.description: Building a Fully Automated Horse Racing AI Prediction Pipeline with Flutter + Supabase Why Horse Racing? Horse racing data is rich, structured, and updated daily — a perfect playground for...

item.title: How I Published 21 Technical Articles in One Day Using GitHub Actions + Supabase
item.description: How I Published 21 Technical Articles in One Day Using GitHub Actions + Supabase The Problem While building my Flutter Web + Supabase app, I kept writing draft articles but never publishing them....

item.title: Forge IL Can Now Compile Itself - And We Have a New Word for What We're Building
item.description: A Milestone, a Moment, and a Question Sprint 0 is done. Forge IL - the intermediate language layer at the heart of the Forge 4D ecosystem - can now partially compile itself. That is the...

item.title: Why Generative AI Isn’t Enough, Enter Agentic Systems
item.description: Generative AI vs Agentic AI From Content Creation to Autonomous Action As we all move on from AWS DeepRacer (well I try to) and look towards what has replaced it, the "AWS AI League", we find that...

item.title: Inside an AI Pipeline: What Actually Happens After You Train a Model
item.description: Training a model is the easiest part of AI. Building the system around it is where things get real. 🧠 The Biggest Misunderstanding in AI Most people think AI looks like this: Data → Model →...

item.title: How to Fix robots.txt for ChatGPT and Gemini in Magento 2
item.description: Your sitemap is configured. Your Core Web Vitals score is green. Your product catalog is perfectly structured. And yet when a user asks ChatGPT for products you sell, your store doesn't appear....

item.title: Stop Rebuilding Your Claude Code Setup - Scaffold It Once with Worclaude
item.description: Every time I started a new project with Claude Code, I rebuilt the same .claude/ directory from scratch - agents, commands, skills, hooks, permissions. Copy from the last repo, tweak, fix what...

item.title: I Built a Fully Local, AI-Native Hedge Fund System (Multi-Agent, Auditable, No Paid APIs)
item.description: Most “AI trading projects” fall into one of three categories: notebook experiments single-model pipelines or black-box systems with no observability They don’t resemble real trading systems. So I...

item.title: I built a tool that visualizes your code step by step — Recursive
item.description: Recursive is a open-source tool that lets you paste your code and watch it execute line by line. No setup, no breakpoints — just paste and run. Try it out → What it does Paste a function (or plain...

item.title: How to build an x402-gated MCP endpoint (with real Base L2 USDC flow)
item.description: An MCP server that charges USDC for a single feed call, end to end. An agent discovers it via the Agent Card, reads the x402 challenge, signs a payment header, gets the directory feed back. No...

item.title: Gucci-branded Google smart glasses are coming next year
item.description: Google is reportedly partnering with Gucci to make a pair of AI smart glasses stylish enough people might actually want to wear them. According to Reuters, Gucci parent company Kering is planning...

item.title: Ballmer gives $80 million to NPR, with strings attached
item.description: Connie Ballmer, wife of former Microsoft CEO Steve Ballmer and co-founder of the Ballmer Group, has given $80 million to NPR. That's roughly seven years' worth of government funding ($11.2m) after...

item.title: Netflix embraces vertical video with major mobile app update
item.description: Netflix announced on Thursday that it will be launching a redesigned mobile app, which will include a vertical video feed, at the end of April. "This redesign will better reflect our expanding...

item.title: Physical Intelligence, a hot robotics startup, says its new robot brain can figure out tasks it was never taught
item.description: The new model, called π0.7, represents what the company describes as an early but meaningful step toward the long-sought goal of a general-purpose robot brain.

item.title: Netflix co-founder Reed Hastings is officially leaving the company
item.description: Netflix co-founder and chairman Reed Hastings plans to leave the company after nearly 30 years. The news comes as part of Netflix's Q1 2026 earnings results released on Thursday, which says...

item.title: OpenAI takes aim at Anthropic with beefed-up Codex that gives it more power over your desktop
item.description: OpenAI's agentic coding tool has gotten a major makeover, with a variety of new powers and abilities.

item.title: Live Nation says it will fight monopoly suit loss
item.description: After a jury found that Live Nation-Ticketmaster violated antitrust law on several counts, the company warns in a blog post that the verdict "is not the last word on this matter." The company...

item.title: Ozlo’s comfy Sleepbuds are nearly 30 percent off in the run-up to Mother’s Day
item.description: If you’re struggling to get a full night of rest, a good pair of sleep earbuds can help you tune out unwanted distractions. The Ozlo Sleepbuds are one such option, and they’re currently available...

item.title: Teenage Engineering might be getting into instrument amps next
item.description: An unannounced Teenage Engineering device, the KO-Amp 35, can be found over at the FCC in a new filing. The label clearly marks it as a member of the mid-range EP family instruments, which...

item.title: The only way to fight deepfakes is by making deepfakes
item.description: I was unsure if my parents would notice that the voice on the other end wasn't mine - or that it was mine, sort of, but it wasn't me. The voice said hello, asked my dad how he was doing, and asked...

item.title: Casely has reannounced a power bank recall from 2025 following a fatality
item.description: Casely first recalled over 429,000 of its 5,000mAh Power Pods wireless power banks in April 2025 following 51 reports of their lithium-ion batteries "overheating, expanding or catching fire,"...

item.title: Anthropic CPO leaves Figma’s board after reports he will offer a competing product
item.description: Krieger's departure and any forthcoming design tools will be another data point for investors who fear the SaaSpocalypse — that the largest AI labs will come to dominate software businesses, a...

item.title: The Battle for OpenAI’s Soul
item.description: In Musk v. Altman, a jury will soon determine whether OpenAI has strayed from its founding mission to ensure AGI benefits humanity. Here’s what to know.

item.title: Newly Discovered PowMix Botnet Hits Czech Workers Using Randomized C2 Traffic
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have warned of an active malicious campaign that's targeting the workforce in the Czech Republic with a previously undocumented botnet dubbed PowMix since at least...

item.title: The UK Launches Its $675 Million Sovereign AI Fund
item.description: In a bid to minimize dependence on technology from other countries, the UK government is plowing resources into homegrown AI startups.

item.title: The nine best ways to protect, customize, and accessorize your MacBook Neo
item.description: The MacBook Neo is poised to be a top-selling laptop in 2026, thanks in large part to its affordable $599 entry price. Despite launching at a more accessible price point than Apple’s $1,099...

item.title: Google now lets you explore the web side-by-side with AI Mode
item.description: Now, when you're using AI Mode on Chrome desktop, clicking a link will open the web page side-by-side with AI Mode.

item.title: Google's AI Mode Update Tries to Kill Tab Hopping in Chrome
item.description: Google latest update to AI Mode in its Chrome browser is designed to keep the chatbot-style search tool always around once you start an online search journey.

item.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
item.description: AI Mode in Chrome

item.title: InsightFinder raises $15M to help companies figure out where AI agents go wrong
item.description: According to CEO Helen Gu, the biggest problem facing the industry today is not just monitoring and diagnosing where AI models go wrong — it's also diagnosing how the entire tech stack operates...
